text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're going to be training differently than usual
today.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Signature racewear prep is done. All that's left is
to run.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how much these clothes will change the
way I run... Let's hurry up and try them out.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! Brian, you look amazing! Are you gonna
race in those clothes?!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! Looks like she's ready for a G1 race! Excuse
meee! Over here, over here!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch. What a racket.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I thought it would be a good idea to get her
practicing in her signature racewear in
preparation for the G1 races, but... it seems to
have backfired.
choice_data_list: I'll go tell them to ease off.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: No need. Let's just run.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll shut 'em up!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
Look at that acceleration! We've gotta get her in
frame somehow!

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text:
Oh my goodness! You can even feel her
determination fro...

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text: ...From...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Phew... How was my time?
...Hello? Snap out of it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Wearing these clothes really got me fired up. I
wonder if it's because of the cleat motif?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
All I can hear when I'm racing is my own
heartbeat... and the breath of my prey before me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't matter if there's a clamor around me or
someone on my tail—nothing reaches me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm shutting it all out, stamping it apart with every
stride.
choice_data_list: I'm looking forward to the actual race!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, let's go again. I haven't got my fill yet!

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text:
We should run too! We can't just sit here staring
after seeing a display like that!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
Silence your shutters, guys! We want to capture
her concentrating and running at her full
potential!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her intense focus while running, Narita
Brian is able to complete her training calmly.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text:
I see. A mesmerizing run! That could make for a
good headline!

text_block_list.name: Younger Students
text_block_list.text:
Wow... Even when she's fed up, she looks...
wonderful.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch. I don't need company.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I run alone. The rest of you can laze about as you
please.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone quickly apologizes to the irritated
Narita Brian and regains their focus.
